name: pc-mnn-server-desktop
author: WAIC
description: Electron shell for the PC MNN Server developer console

scripts.dev: npm run check-node && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron .
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --win
